title: Don't Untoggle Sprint
description: Prevents sprint being toggled off on respawn after a death
body:
Prevents sprint being toggled back off on respawn after a death, given that the player is using toggle sprint. This behaviour was changed in Minecraft 1.20, and it is inconvenient for minigames with lots of death. If your sprint is not set to toggle, it has no impact.

Does not yet work with immediate respawn.

The mod works by simulating the keypress to sprint as soon as you move on respawn, if you had sprint toggled on when you died.
Report issues on the GitHub!
